questions.questionText: Regarding proper mammography technique, which of the following statement is **NOT** correct?

options.text: Fat is seen posterior to the fibroglandular tissue.
In MLO view, pectoralis muscle is convex and but not extends inferior to the posterior nipple line.
The length of the posterior nipple line on CC view should be within 1cm of its length on the MLO view.
In MLO view, the inframammary fold is open, with lower breast and partial upper abdominal wall included.

questions.explanation:
正解 **B**（不正確）。足夠的 MLO 胸大肌應呈 convex 且**延伸至或低於 posterior nipple line（PNL）**;「convex 但未延伸至 PNL 下方」屬定位不足。脂肪在纖維腺體後方(A)、CC PNL 在 MLO 1 cm 內(C)、IMF 打開(D)皆正確。

→ [[mammography-positioning]]

questions.questionText: 關於 asymmetries 以下何者為**非**? (A)在 2013 版 ACR BI-RADS 分為 4 種 asymmetries。

options.text: developing asymmetry 可能有 15%實為惡性。
mammography 見到之 developing asymmetry 若超音波為 negative 仍需切片(mammo-guided biopsy)。
focal asymmetry 比 global asymmetry 可疑程度低。

questions.explanation:
正解 **D**（非）。**focal asymmetry 比 global asymmetry 更可疑**（global 多為正常變異）。2013 分四型(A)、developing 約 15% 惡性(B)、developing 即使 US 陰性仍須切片(C)皆正確。

→ [[breast-asymmetry]]

questions.questionText: Which one is the definition of focal asymmetry in BI-RADS 2013 for mammography?

options.text: visible on only one mammographic projection and lacking convex margins
visible on different mammographic projections, lacks the convex-outward borders
convex margins that is visible on two orthogonal views
large amount of fibrogranular tissue over a substantial portion of breast
new, larger, or more conspicuous than on a previous examination.

questions.explanation:
正解 **B**。focal asymmetry＝**在不同(兩個)投影皆可見、缺 convex-outward 邊界（邊界 concave-outward）**。單一投影＝(one-view) asymmetry(A)、有 convex 邊界＝mass(C)、範圍大＝global(D)、新/變大＝developing(E)。

→ [[breast-asymmetry]]

questions.questionText: 關於 mammograghy 之 BI-RADS 2 calcifications 以下何者為**非**

options.text: popcorn, coarse calcifications。
rod, secretory calcifications。
grouped amorphous calcifications。
milk of calcium (sedimenting)。

questions.explanation:
正解 **C**（非 BI-RADS 2）。**grouped amorphous 屬可疑型態（BI-RADS 4）**。popcorn/coarse(A)、rod/secretory(B)、milk of calcium sedimenting(D)皆典型良性。

→ [[breast-calcifications]]

questions.questionText: 關於 BI-RADS mammograghy 2013 版對於 breast composition 之描述以下何者為**非**

options.text: 緻密度之分級為 a,b,c,d。
報告中需描述 fibroglandular density 佔全乳之約略比例。 (例如 0-25%等)
最緻密等級為 extremely dense。
等級 a 為 “the breasts are almost entirely fatty”。

questions.explanation:
正解 **B**（非）。BI-RADS 2013 **移除百分比估計、改主觀描述**;不再要求報告纖維腺體佔比(如 0–25%)。a–d 分級(A)、最緻密＝extremely dense(C)、a＝almost entirely fatty(D)皆正確。

→ [[breast-composition]]

questions.questionText: Which statement about “mass” detected on mammography is **WRONG**?

options.text: A fat containing mass is almost always benign
A mass with indistinct margin usually implies a suspicious finding
A mass with three undulations should be described as irregular in shape
A mass with margin of short cycle undulations usually implies a suspicious finding
None of the above

questions.explanation:
正解 **C**（錯誤）。**2–3 個 undulations 的腫塊仍稱 oval,非 irregular**。indistinct margin＝可疑(B)、short-cycle undulations＝microlobulated/可疑(D)、含脂肪腫塊幾乎良性(A)皆正確。

→ [[bi-rads-mass-lexicon]]

questions.questionText: According to ACR BI-RADS 5th edition, which is wrong about the likelihood of breast cancer in each final assessment category?

options.text: category 2, essentially 0%
category 3, equal or less than 3%
category 4a, equal or less than 10%
category 4b, between 10% and 50%
category 5, equal or more than 95%.

questions.explanation:
正解 **B**（錯誤）。**BI-RADS 3 為 ≤2%**（非 ≤3%）。category 2 ~0%(A)、4a 2–9%(C)、4b 10–49%(D)、5 ≥95%(E)皆正確。

→ [[bi-rads-categories]]

questions.questionText: 以下何種描述 『**不**』符合BI-RADS 2013 lexicon for mammography finding?

options.text: An oval circumscribed fat containing nodule
Developing asymmetry
Segmental fine linear calcifications
Intramammary lymph node
None of the above

questions.explanation:
正解 **A**（不符 lexicon）。**「nodule」非 BI-RADS 用語,應用「mass」**。developing asymmetry(B)、segmental fine linear calcifications(C)、intramammary lymph node(D)皆為合法 lexicon。

→ [[bi-rads-mass-lexicon]]

questions.questionText: Which statement about “background parenchymal enhancement (BPE)” on breast MRI is **WRONG**?

options.text: BPE is not necessarily related to the amount of fibroglandular tissue
BPE is more prominent in the follicular phase of the menstrual cycle
Younger patients with dense breasts are more likely to demonstrate BPE
BPE usually demonstrates progressive enhancement over time
None of the above

questions.explanation:
正解 **B**（錯誤）。**BPE 在黃體期(luteal)最明顯**,非 follicular phase。BPE 與纖維腺體量不必然相關(A)、年輕緻密乳房較易顯 BPE(C)、隨時間 progressive(D)皆正確。

→ [[breast-mri-bpe]]

questions.questionText: Which statement is **not true** for background parenchymal enhancement (BPE) at breast MR imaging?

options.text: BPE commonly begins in the peripheral breast tissue and gradually becomes apparent in the more central breast tissue.
Non-urgent breast MR imaging should be scheduled during the 3rd week of the menstrual cycle (days 7-15).
Bilateral similar areas of enhancement, regardless of distribution, are more characteristic of benign enhancement than of malignancy.
BPE is proportional to mammographic density.

questions.explanation:
正解 **D**（非真）。**BPE 與 mammographic density 不必然相關**（非成正比）;extremely dense 可僅輕微 BPE。BPE 始於周邊(A)、雙側相似強化偏良性(C)皆真。（註：B「第 3 週」亦有爭議——最佳排程為第 2 週/7–14 天;官方標準答案取 D。）

→ [[breast-mri-bpe]]

questions.questionText: Which statement about breast MRI is **WRONG**?

options.text: A focus may be benign or malignant
Multiple separated foci with intervening non-enhancing breast tissue should be considered as background parenchymal enhancement (BPE)
Non-enhancing masses with benign morphology are nearly always benign
Pre-contrast high signal in ducts on T1WI is a benign finding
None of the above

questions.explanation:
正解 **E**（none of the above）。A–D 皆正確：focus 可良可惡(A)、被不強化實質分隔的多發 foci 視為 BPE 型態(B)、benign 形態不強化腫塊近乎良性(C)、T1WI precontrast 管內高訊號為良性(D)。

→ [[breast-mri-bpe]]

questions.questionText: Which statement about breast MRI is **WRONG**?

options.text: Peak enhancement is usually reached at 2-3 minutes after bolus injection
A washout kinetic curve is defined as a decrease of more than 20% signal intensity after peak enhancement is reached
Many malignant lesions exhibit a washout kinetic curve
Plateau kinetic curve can be seen with both benign and malignancy lesions
Elevated choline on 1H-MRS is an indicator of increased cellular proliferation

questions.explanation:
正解 **B**（錯誤）。**washout 定義為峰後訊號下降『>10%』**,非 >20%。峰值 2–3 分(A)、washout 惡性常見(C)、plateau 良惡皆可(D)、choline 升高＝細胞增生(E)皆正確。

→ [[breast-mri-kinetics]]

questions.questionText: 下列有關 the features of breast cancers detected in women with implants 何者為**非**?

options.text: There is a higher rate of nonpalpable, invasive cancers in women with implants.
The stage distribution of cancers in women with implants is similar to screening populations
The majority of cancers appeared as irregular, non-circumscribed, enhancing masses.
Tumor spread along the implant contour was more likely to be seen with subglandular implants than with subpectoral implants.

questions.explanation:
正解 **A**（非）。隆乳婦女因植入物降低乳攝敏感度,偵測到的癌**多為『可觸及』**,並非有更高比例的『不可觸及』浸潤癌。分期與篩檢族群相近(B)、多為不規則非清楚邊界強化腫塊(C)、subglandular 易沿輪廓擴散(D)皆正確。

→ [[breast-cancer-implants]]

questions.questionText: 下列有關 Features of invasive lobular carcinoma, 何者為**非**?

options.text: 10% of all breast cancers
Grows in single-cell files
Calcifications is a feature
Often seen on one view

questions.explanation:
正解 **C**（非）。**ILC 微鈣化少見(<10%)、非特徵**,以 spiculated mass／架構扭曲／不對稱密度為主。占乳癌 ~10%(A)、單列(single-file)生長(B)、常僅單一投影可見(D)皆正確。

→ [[invasive-lobular-carcinoma]]

questions.questionText: A 40-year-old woman presents with a rapidly enlarging left-sided breast mass. A large, firm, non-tender discrete mass is noted on clinical examination. Mammography reveals a 7cm multilobulated soft tissue density mass in the left upper quadrant. On ultrasound the mass is solid with cystic areas. Posterior acoustic enhancement is demonstrated. What is the most likely diagnosis?

options.text: Phyllodes tumor
Adenoid cystic carcinoma
Melanoma metastasis
Fibromatosis

questions.explanation:
正解 **A**。**Phyllodes tumor**——40 歲、快速增大、大而多分葉,US 為實心含裂隙狀(cleft-like)囊腔、後方回音增強。adenoid cystic carcinoma、melanoma metastasis、fibromatosis 較不符。

→ [[phyllodes-tumor]]

questions.questionText: Regarding mammography, which of the following statement is **NOT** correct?

options.text: In digital mammography, mean glandular dose received is around 2 mGy per exposure.
Radiation dose is lower in thinner than in thicker breasts.
Most commonly used anode/filter combination is Mo/Mo. (Mo: molybdenum)
Typical kVp for mammography are 80-100 kVp for rhodium (Rh).

questions.explanation:
正解 **D**（不正確）。乳攝用**低 kVp(25–35)**,「銠 80–100 kVp」錯誤。MGD ~2 mGy(A)、薄乳劑量低(B)、Mo/Mo 最常用(C)皆正確。

→ [[mammography-physics]]

questions.questionText: Regarding mammoagraphy, which of the following statement is NOT correct?

options.text: Placing the breast halfway between focal spot and image receptor would magnify the image by a factor of 1.4.
A digital detector with 0.1mm pixel size has spatial resolution of 5 line pairs/mm.
Magnification mammography uses smaller focal spot (0.1mm) than screening mammography to reduce image blurring.
MLO view means x-ray source in the medial location, and image receptor in the lateral location.

questions.explanation:
正解 **A**（不正確）。乳房置於焦點與接收器**正中間**時 SOD＝SID/2 → **放大率＝2**（非 1.4）。0.1 mm 像素 ~5 lp/mm(B)、放大用小焦點 0.1 mm(C)、MLO 源在內上接收器在外下(D)皆正確。

→ [[mammography-physics]]

questions.questionText: Features of gastrinomas, which one is **wrong**?

options.text: 30% of pancreatic neuroendocrine tumors
Most common hyperfunctioning neuroendocrine tumor
Associated with Zollinger-Ellison syndrome
60-80% lesions are malignant

questions.explanation:
正解 **B**（錯誤）。**insulinoma 才是最常見的亢進性/功能性 NET**,非 gastrinoma。gastrinoma 占胰 NET 約 20–30%(A 約略)、與 Zollinger-Ellison 相關(C)、60–80% 惡性(D)皆正確。

→ [[pancreatic-neuroendocrine-tumors]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements about the syndromic pancreatic islet cell tumors (ICTs) is wrong?

options.text: Syndromic ICTs are more likely to be cystic or necrotic than nonsyndromic ICTs
Insulinoma is the most common syndromic ICT.
Gastrinoma may related to Zollinger-Ellison syndrome
People with vipoma may present with WDHA (watery diarrhea, hypokalemia, and achlorhydria).

questions.explanation:
正解 **A**（錯誤）。相反——**nonsyndromic ICT（尤其非功能性）較大、較易囊變/壞死**;syndromic（MEN1）多小而多發、早發現。insulinoma 為最常見 syndromic ICT(B)、gastrinoma 與 ZES 相關(C)、VIPoma 呈 WDHA(D)皆正確。

→ [[pancreatic-neuroendocrine-tumors]]

questions.questionText: 關於The Prostate Imaging Reporting and Data System (PI-RADS) Version 2的敘述，以下何者**錯誤**？

options.text: For peripheral zone abnormalities, the apparent diffusion coefficient (ADC) map in combination with diffusion-weighted imaging (DWI) performed with high b values (≧1400 sec/mm2) is the dominant parameter for clinically significant cancer.
For transition zone abnormalities, T2-weighted MR imaging is dominant for overall lesion assessment.
MR spectroscopic (MRS) imaging has ancillary roles in the characterization of lesions considered equivocal for clinically significant cancer.

Assessment with dynamic contrast-enhanced MR imaging is simplified, being considered positive or negative on the basis of qualitative evaluation for a focal area of rapid enhancement matching an abnormality on DWI-ADC or T2-weighted MR images.

questions.explanation:
正解 **C**（錯誤）。**PI-RADS v2 不納入 MRS**（已移除、無 ancillary 角色）。PZ 以 DWI/ADC 主導(A)、TZ 以 T2WI 主導(B)、DCE 簡化為陰/陽性(D)皆正確。

→ [[pi-rads]]

questions.questionText: About solid and pseudopapillary tumor of pancreas, which description is correct:

options.text: A common tumor of pancreas
Usually found in young female patient
Usually asymptom due to small size
Highly malignant tumor and easy to metastasis

questions.explanation:
正解 **B**。SPN **好發年輕女性**。其為少見腫瘤(A 誤)、常大且有囊變故有症狀(C 誤)、低惡性潛能轉移少見(D 誤)。

→ [[solid-pseudopapillary-neoplasm]]

questions.questionText: Which is the most common primary nonhematopoietic malignant tumor of the spleen?

options.text: Littoral cell tumor
Hemangioendothelioma
Angiosarcoma
Lymphoma

questions.explanation:
正解 **C**。**Angiosarcoma 為最常見的脾原發非造血性惡性腫瘤**。lymphoma 雖為脾最常見惡性但屬造血性(本題排除);littoral cell tumor、hemangioendothelioma 罕見。

→ [[splenic-angiosarcoma]]

questions.questionText: Which is the **most common** primary osseous malignancy of the chest wall?

options.text: Osteosarcoma.
Myeloma.
Ewing Sarcoma.
Chondrosarcoma.

questions.explanation:
正解 **D**。**Chondrosarcoma 為胸壁最常見原發惡性骨腫瘤**（好發肋軟骨交界、含軟骨基質鈣化）。osteosarcoma、Ewing sarcoma、myeloma 較少。

→ [[chest-wall-tumors]]

questions.questionText: About application of the Silhouette sign on chest plain film, which one of the following statements is **WRONG**?

options.text: Loss of right heart border: right middle lobe or anterior pleura/mediastinum
Loss of aortic arch: left lower lobe or middle/posterior mediastinum
Loss of left heart border: ligula or anterior pleura/mediastinum
Loss of right paratracheal stripe: right upper lobe
None of the above

questions.explanation:
正解 **B**（錯誤）。**主動脈弓（knob）消失＝LUL（apicoposterior）或中/後縱膈,非 LLL**。右心緣＝RML/前胸膜(A)、左心緣＝lingula/前胸膜(C)、右氣管旁線＝RUL(D)皆正確。

→ [[silhouette-sign]]

questions.questionText: 關於 silhouette sign 下列何者最**不**可能?

options.text: 與 SVC/ascending aorta margin 邊緣不清楚之病灶可能在 anterior segment of RUL
與 right heart border 邊緣不清楚之病灶可能在 medial segment of RML
與 left heart border 邊緣不清楚之病灶可能在 inferior segment of left lingual lobe
與 right diaphragm 邊緣不清楚之病灶可能在 RUL

questions.explanation:
正解 **D**（最不可能）。**右橫膈邊緣不清＝RLL,非 RUL**。SVC/升主動脈緣＝RUL 前段(A)、右心緣＝RML medial segment(B)、左心緣＝lingula inferior segment(C)皆合理。

→ [[silhouette-sign]]

questions.questionText: 有關 Incomplete border sign 的敘述下列何者為**非**?

options.text: 病灶可能部分邊緣不清楚
可能是 pleural lesion (C)可能是 chest wall 或 skin lesion
不可能是 lung lesion lung lesion with pleural/extrapleural

questions.explanation:
正解 **D**（為非）。incomplete border sign **亦可見於向胸膜/肺外延伸的肺病灶**,故「不可能是肺病灶」錯誤。可部分邊緣不清(A)、可為 pleural(B)、可為胸壁/皮膚病灶(C)皆正確。

→ [[silhouette-sign]]

questions.questionText: What sign is seen in pneumpericardium?

options.text: Bulging fissure sign
Continuous diaphragm sign
Deep sulcus sign
Luftsichel sign

questions.explanation:
正解 **B**。**Continuous diaphragm sign（連續橫膈徵）**見於 pneumopericardium（及 pneumomediastinum）。bulging fissure＝Klebsiella 肺炎(A)、deep sulcus＝仰臥氣胸(C)、Luftsichel＝LUL 塌陷(D)。

→ [[pneumopericardium-signs]]

questions.questionText: Which one of the followings is least likely to have **crazy paving sign** on HRCT images?

options.text: Nonspecific interstitial pneumonitis
Cryptogenic organizing pneumonia
Pneumocystis pneumonia
Respiratory bronchiolitis superimposed on interstitial lung disease

questions.explanation:
正解 **D**（最不可能）。**RB-ILD 以氣道中心結節為主、非典型 crazy-paving**。NSIP(A)、COP(B)、PCP(C)皆可呈 crazy-paving。

→ [[crazy-paving]]

questions.questionText: 有關pulmonary infection的敘述，下列何者為**非**

options.text: Monad sign describes air that surrounds a mycetoma in a pre-existing pulmonary cavity. It should not be confused with the air crescent sign which is seen in recovering angioinvasive aspergillosis
Finger-in-glove sign describes allergic bronchopulmonary aspergillosis (ABPA) as mucoid impaction within bronchiectasis.
Water-lily sign is seen in hydatid infections when a cyst membrane floats in residual fluid after cyst rupture
Signet ring sign is early stage of pulmonary paragonimiasis infection as thin-walled crescent-shaped worm cysts

questions.explanation:
正解 **D**（為非）。**Signet ring sign 指支氣管擴張（擴張支氣管＋伴行動脈）,非 paragonimiasis 早期**。Monad（mycetoma 空氣環，A）、finger-in-glove（ABPA，B）、water-lily（hydatid 漂浮內膜，C）皆正確。

→ [[pulmonary-infection-signs]]

questions.questionText: Which following disease is IgG4 related disease:

options.text: Kikuchi-Fujimoto disease
Castleman disease
Kimura disease
Mikulicz disease

questions.explanation:
正解 **D**。**Mikulicz disease（淚腺/唾液腺）屬 IgG4-related disease**。Kikuchi-Fujimoto（壞死性淋巴結炎，A）、Castleman（B）、Kimura（C）皆非 IgG4-RD。

→ [[igg4-related-disease]]

questions.questionText: 關於 Autoimmune pancreatitis 以下何者為**非** ?

options.text: association with primary sclerocing cholangitis
sausage shape pancreas
stricture of the pancreatic duct
focal type more common than diffuse type

questions.explanation:
正解 **D**（為非）。**diffuse（sausage-shaped）型比 focal 型常見**。合併 PSC(A)、香腸狀胰臟(B)、主胰管狹窄(C)皆正確。

→ [[autoimmune-pancreatitis]]

questions.questionText: 有關pulmonary Langerhans cell histiocytosis, 下列何者有誤

options.text: In the early stage, pulmonary LCH is characterized by the presence of granulomas resulting in destruction of lung tissue.
In the later stages, the cellular granulomas are replaced by fibrosis and lung cysts.
Less than 10% of adults with LCH are smokers.
HRCT demonstrates cystic air spaces, which are usually less than 10 mm in diameter.

questions.explanation:
正解 **C**（有誤）。**up to ~95% 的成人 LCH 有吸菸史**,非 <10%。早期肉芽腫(A)、後期纖維化+囊腫(B)、HRCT 囊腔常 <10 mm(D)皆正確。

→ [[plch]]

questions.questionText: 以下何者為Lymphangioleiomyomatosis常見的影像表現?

options.text: Pneumothorax
Cysts
Chylothorax
Hyperinflation
Mediastinal lymphadenopathy

questions.explanation:
正解 **B**。**囊腫(cysts)——瀰漫薄壁囊腫是 LAM 的標誌性、近乎 100% 的最常見影像發現**(diagnostic hallmark)。其餘選項中 pneumothorax(~36%)、hyperinflation(33–62%)亦常見,chylothorax(~10–20%)、mediastinal lymphadenopathy(~26%)較少;但 **cysts 為最具特徵的定義性發現**。（Radiopaedia: Lymphangioleiomyomatosis 實際查證 2026-06-18）

→ [[lam]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following modality most accurately measure right ventricular volumes and ejection fraction?

options.text: Cardiac MR imaging.
Cardiac echography.
Cardiac CT.
Catheter right ventriculography.

questions.explanation:
正解 **A**。**Cardiac MR imaging 為量測 RV 容積與 EF 的 gold standard**（cine 短軸堆疊、無幾何假設）。echo(幾何假設)、CT(輻射/時間解析)、導管 RV 攝影(侵入)皆較不準。

→ [[cardiac-mri-function]]

questions.questionText: About transcatheter aortic valve implantation (TAVI) for aortic stenosis 下列何者為**非**?

options.text: 因為要得到好的影像品質, 用 ß-blocker 控制心跳是必需的
一般測量 aortic annulus 大小都在 cardiac cycle 中的 systolic phase
如 aortic annulus 至 coronary ostium 距離<10mm 可能在 TAVI 置放後有 risk of coronary occlusion
aortic annulus 一般指 aortic valve leaflets insertion 最低點, 剛好在 left ventricular outflow tract (LVOT)之上

questions.explanation:
正解 **A**（為非）。**TAVI 術前 CT 不需(且應避免)β-blocker**（需涵蓋整個心動週期、與冠狀 CTA 不同）。收縮期量 annulus(B)、annulus-冠狀動脈口 <10 mm 有阻塞風險(C)、annulus＝瓣葉最低插入點(D)皆正確。

→ [[tavi]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements is **TRUE** concerning MRI of cardiomyopathy?

options.text: In nonischemic dilated cardiomyopathy, there is regional ventricular wall thinning.
In hypertrophic cardiomyopathy, the left ventricle is grossly dilated.
Restrictive cardiomyopathy can be distinguished from constrictive pericarditis by MRI.
Blooming decreased myocardial signal intensity on gradient recalled echo (GRE) sequences suggests amyloidosis.

questions.explanation:
正解 **C**。**Restrictive CM 可藉 MRI 與 constrictive pericarditis 區分**（心包厚度/鈣化）。DCM 為心室擴大室壁薄非局部增厚(A 誤)、HCM 心室不擴大(B 誤)、GRE blooming 低訊號＝鐵沉積(D 誤)。

→ [[cardiomyopathy-mri]]

questions.questionText: Which statement is **false** regarding coronary artery fistulas (CAFs)?

options.text: The clinical presentation is mainly dependent on the severity of the left-to-right shunt. The majority of adult patients are usually asymptomatic.
The majority of symptomatic CAFs originate from the RCA, but asymptomatic CAFs demonstrate a greater prevalence of origin from the LCA.
Low-pressure structures are the most common sites of drainage of the CAF.
The most common drainage site is pulmonary artery

questions.explanation:
正解 **D**（為假）。**CAF 最常引流至 right ventricle(~41%)** > RA > PA > 冠狀竇,故「最常引流至 pulmonary artery」假。臨床依左到右分流嚴重度(A)、症狀性多源自 RCA(B)、引流至低壓結構(C)皆正確。

→ [[coronary-fistula]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following MR scans usually require injection of gadolinium

options.text: Time-of-flight angiography for lower limb.
Time-resolved MR angiography for lower limb.
Cine steady-state free precession in cardiac MR.
Navigator-gated, ECG-triggered 3D whole-heart MRI angiography.

questions.explanation:
正解 **B**。**Time-resolved MRA（下肢，如 TRICKS/TWIST）需注射 gadolinium**。TOF(流入增強,A)、cine SSFP(C)、navigator 3D whole-heart(SSFP 血池,D)皆非對比、不需釓。

→ [[contrast-enhanced-mra]]

questions.questionText: What morphologic hypertrophic cardiomyopathy phenotype is the **most common**?

options.text: Asymmetric septal
Concentric septal
Apical
Basal septal

questions.explanation:
正解 **A**。**Asymmetric septal（不對稱中隔型）為 HCM 最常見形態（約 60–70%）**。apical、concentric、basal septal 較少。

→ [[hypertrophic-cardiomyopathy]]

questions.questionText: About hypertrophic cardiomyopathy (HCM), which statement is **wrong**?

options.text: The typical pattern of late gadolinium enhancement in HCM is midwall patchy or punctate hyperenhancement in a thickened myocardium in a noncoronary distribution.
The apical form is the most common morphologic variant of HCM and accounts for up to 60%–70% of cases.
Specific complications of apical HCM include development of apical infarctions with resultant aneurysm formation

The diagnosis of asymmetric septal hypertrophy is made when septal thickness is greater than or equal to 15 mm or when the ratio of the septal thickness to the thickness of the inferior wall at the midventricular level is greater than 1.5.

questions.explanation:
正解 **B**（錯誤）。**apical 型非最常見——asymmetric septal 才是（60–70%），apical 僅 ~2%（日本人 ~15%）**。LGE 典型 midwall patchy(A)、apical HCM 併心尖梗塞/動脈瘤(C)、asymmetric septal 定義中隔 ≥1.5×(D)皆正確。

→ [[hypertrophic-cardiomyopathy]]

questions.questionText: Which is **wrong** about hypertrophic cardiomyopathy?

options.text: Hypertrophic cardiomyopathy (HCM) is a heterogeneous group of diseases related to sarcomere gene mutations exhibiting heterogeneous phenotypes with an autosomal dominant mendelian pattern of inheritance.
The disease is characterized by left ventricular (LV) hypertrophy in the absence of another systemic or cardiac disease to account for the changes noted.
The asymmetric septal form is the most common morphologic variant of HCM and accounts for up to 60%–70% of cases.
The typical pattern of LGE in HCM is subendocardial hyperenhancement with coronary distribution.

questions.explanation:
正解 **D**（錯誤）。**HCM 的 LGE 典型為 midwall patchy/punctate（非 subendocardial 冠狀動脈分布；後者提示缺血）**。肌節疾病(A)、LV 肥厚無其他負荷(B)、asymmetric septal 最常見(C)皆正確。

→ [[hypertrophic-cardiomyopathy]]

questions.questionText: Eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis (Churg-Strauss syndrome) is characterized by following **except**

options.text: Asthma
Hypereosinophilia
Serum cANCA positive.
Necrotizing vasculitis

questions.explanation:
正解 **C**（除外）。**EGPA（Churg-Strauss）典型為 pANCA(MPO-ANCA)；cANCA(PR3) 屬 GPA/Wegener**。asthma(A)、hypereosinophilia(B)、necrotizing vasculitis(D)皆為 EGPA 特徵。

questions.questionText: 關於retinoblastoma以下敘述何者為**非**?

options.text: Retinoblastoma, which is the most common intraocular pediatric tumor,
Hereditary retinoblastoma is usually bilateral and multifocal.
Optic nerve involvement is a marker for aggressive and advanced tumors and is associated with a high risk of metastatic disease and consequent increased mortality rates
Intraocular hemorrhages and calcifications are depicted best on DWI sequence

questions.explanation:
正解 **D**（為非）。**眼內鈣化以 CT（或 GRE/SWI）顯示最佳，非 DWI**。最常見兒童眼內腫瘤(A)、遺傳型多雙側多灶(B)、視神經侵犯為侵襲性/進展標記(C)皆正確。

→ [[retinoblastoma]]

questions.questionText: 關於 Corona mortis artery 之敘述，下列何者錯誤?

options.text: 又稱為死亡的王冠 (crown of death)
當 obturator artery 起源於 external iliac artery 或 inferior epigastric artery 時，即可稱為 corona mortis artery
當 inferior pubic ramus 骨折時，可能會造成此血管大量出血
由於此血管的高發生率，對於骨盆出血病患之栓塞治療，必須常規地檢查 external iliac artery。

questions.explanation:
正解 **D**（錯誤）。「因高發生率必須常規檢查 external iliac」措辭過度（盛行率非極高、非強制常規）。crown of death(A)、obturator 源自 external iliac/inf epigastric(B)正確。註：corona mortis 跨 **superior** pubic ramus,故 C 寫「inferior pubic ramus」亦不精確。

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements best characterizes fractures that involve the physis?

options.text: Longitudinal fractures lead to bridge formation more often than do horizontal fractures.

Factures that occur in older childen have a worse prognosis than those in younger children.
The degree of comminution of a fracture does not affect the prognosis.

questions.explanation:

questions.questionText: Which of the following statement about Baker’s cyst is **true**?

questions.questionText: Which one of the following conditions is usually associated with a cross-over sign on the anteroposterior radiograph of the hip?

Femoroacetabular impingement

questions.questionText: Regarding red bone marrow, which of the following is TRUE?

options.text: Red marrow can be focal and mass-like.

questions.questionText: Choose the false statement of giant cell tumor.

options.text: On conventional radiographs show a lytic lesion that has a well-defined sclerotic margin.
It is eccentric in location, and extends to the subchondral bone, and occurs in patients with closed physes.

questions.questionText: Which statement is **not** true for elastography?

options.text: The main objective is to provide an imaging representation of lesion stiffness to improve diagnostic confidence and increase specificity of the ultrasonography.
Malignant lesions tend to be stiffer than benign lesions.
With static elastography, the tissue stiffness can be measured by the Young modulus.
Shear-wave based elastography is able to provide quantitative elastic information in real time.

questions.explanation: 根據Diagn Interv Imaging. 2013 May;94(5):487-95. Static elastography是指靜態施加壓力給組織，然後評估strain的情況並顯示。因為施加的壓力無法量化，也無法定量評估 Young modulus。而dynamic elastography，會調整力道，測量其shear waves propagation，透過E=3 μ換算可量化Young's modulus。部長投影片： ![ADD elastography 1](data/images/obsidian/add-elastography-1-0de1bc3e.png)

在cyst內看到，和 **colloid** 有關，強烈暗示為良性(benignity)  給0分

questions.questionText: 關於超音波假影(artifacts)，以下何者**錯誤**? [[GB adenomyomatosis]]

options.text: **acoustic shadow**也可產生於囊狀構造的邊緣如膽囊
**reverberation** artifact產生於兩介質的音波阻抗差異小時

questions.explanation:
reverberation是在兩介質間反覆反射，兩者阻抗差異大才容易反射
2 subtypes of reverberation artifact:
- Comet-tail artifact: a short train of reverberations from an echogenic focus which has strong parallel reflectors within it (e.g. cholesterol crystals in adenomyomatosis)
- Ring down artifact: a type of continuous sound wave returning to the transducer, often caused by fluid trapped between gas bubbles.

questions.questionText: 下列關於顯影劑使用於不同狀況的病人之描述下列敘述何者為**非**?

options.text: 對於使用Metformin之受檢者於靜脈內注射含碘對比劑若估計腎絲球體過濾率≥ 30 mL/ min/1.73 m2且無急性腎衰竭可繼續正常使用Metformin
高風險含釓對比劑不可用於嚴重腎臟疾病(GFR < 30 mL/min/1.73m2) 或急性腎衰竭之受檢者
對於懷孕婦女可正常使用含釓對比劑
對於哺乳期婦女可繼續哺乳若使用高風險之含釓對比劑或母親很在意建議注射對比劑後可暫停24小時哺餵母乳

questions.explanation:
- C.除非有極強適應症 (very strong indication) ，懷孕婦女建議不使用含釓對比劑。
	- 必須使用時建議使用達到診斷目的之**最小劑量**(2017年為標準劑量)、並使用低風險之含釓造影劑。
- D.為避免嬰兒吸入微量含釓對比劑之母乳，可建議注射對比劑後暫停24 小時哺餵母乳。(2020指引)

questions.questionText: Which is **wrong** about nephrogenic systemic fibrosis ?

options.text: Observed in patients with renal failure
Most have been associated with Ominscan
Some associated with OptiMARK and Magnevist
Frequently reported since 2009

questions.explanation:
(2017 p.32)
- A. 在第四期或第五期慢性腎臟病受檢者，注射含釓對比劑後，約有 1-7% 產生腎因性全身纖維化。

- The overall incidence of NSF was 36.5 cases per 100 000 gadolinium-enhanced magnetic resonance (MR) examinations between 2003 and 2006

questions.questionText: About the TNM staging system for esophageal cancer in the 7th edition of AJCC, which statement is wrong ?

options.text: T4b tumors are unresectable cancers that invade other adjacent structures such as the aorta, carotid vessels, azygos vein, trachea, left main bronchus, or vertebral body
The revised manual defines regional lymph nodes to include any paraesophageal lymph nodes from the cervical nodes to the celiac nodes
An important factor in assessing cancer location is to determine the position where the tumor occupies the largest volume, not the position of the upper edge of the tumor in the esophagus
Tumors in the esophagogastric junction are staged as esophageal cancer if the epicenter is within the proximal 5 cm of the stomach and the tumor extends into the esophagus.

questions.explanation:
, C
A. ~~azygos vein~~
- T4a: Tumor invades the pleura, pericardium, azygos vein, diaphragm, or peritoneum
- T4b: Tumor invades **other adjacent** structures, such as aorta, vertebral body, or airway
C. 舊版對 新版錯
- AJCC 7th: Location is to determine the position of the **upper edge** of the tumor in the esophagus, not the position where the tumor occupies the largest volume
- AJCC 8th: the location is determined by the **epicenter** of tumor

The sac may remain above the pelvis and form an external supravesical hernia or pass downward and form an internal supravesical hernia.
Internal supravesical hernias are divided into two categories.
The categories of internal supravesical hernias are based on whether the course is in front of, beside, or behind the bladder.

questions.questionText: Which is **wrong** about multiple bile duct harmatomas (so called von Meyenburg complex)?

options.text: Both intra- and extra-hepatic bile ducts were normal in this disease.
It should be differentiated from metastatic liver disease and simple hepatic cysts.
Liver ultrasonogrpahy shows uniformly hypoechoic lesions without cometail artifact.
Liver MRI shows hypointense on T1WI, hyperintense on T2WI, and variable enhancement pattern.

questions.explanation:
Tiny individual hamartomas cannot be resolved ==>interpreted as diffuse heterogenous liver echotexture.
Larger hamartomas (>10 mm) may appear hypoechoic or anechoic and comet-tail artifact may be seen.
MRI usually no enhancement
 - thin peripheral rim enhancement has been described (see below), this may represent compressed normal liver parenchyma
 - ~90% of cases an occasional hamartoma can be found containing a mural nodule (fibrocollagenous stroma, see pathology) or rim that is T1 isointense and T2 intermediate, of which ~90% will enhance.

questions.explanation:
Parasitic leiomyoma: A type of **extra**-uterine leiomyoma and present as a peritoneal pelvic mass, **separate** from the uterus, with characteristics similar to uterine leiomyoma.
參考  Diagnostic Imaging – Gynecology. Page 2-80 to 81.
intravenous leiomyomatosis

questions.questionText: Which of the following statement regarding the sonographic findings of gallbladder disease is WRONG?

options.text: Typical gallstones manifest as echogenic foci with acoustic shadow and gravitational dependence.
Sludge produces low-amplitude, nonshadowing echoes with layering.
A gallbladder wall with thickness greater than 3 mm is usually regarded as thickened.
Cholesterol polyps present as mobile, hypoechoic structures attached to the gallbladder wall with posterior acoustic shadow.

questions.explanation: A non-shadowing polypoid ingrowth into gallbladder lumen, which is usually immobile unless there is a relatively long pedunculated component.

questions.questionText: About brain tumors, which of the following was INCORRECT?

options.text: Pilocytic astrocytoma most commonly occurs in the cerebellum.
Pleomorphic xanthoastrocytoma is found almost exclusively in young adults.
All diffusely infiltrating astrocytomas have an inherent tendency to malignant progression.
Ganglioglioma most commonly occurs in the deep hemisphere.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Osborn's Brain, Ch 15
questions.explanation:
正解 **D**（不正確）。**Ganglioglioma 為皮質腫瘤、最常見於顳葉(~70%)**，非深部半球。pilocytic→小腦(A)、PXA→年輕成人(B)、瀰漫浸潤型有惡性進展傾向(C)皆正確。

→ [[brain-tumor-imaging]]

questions.questionText: About demyelinating disease, which of the following was INCORRECT?

options.text: Most multiple sclerosis (MS) plaques are supratentorial.
Active MS plaques may show ring enhancement.
Neuromyelitis optica (NMO) preferentially involves the spinal cord and optic nerves.
NMO patients do not have T2/FLAIR hyperintensities in the cerebral white matter.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Osborn's Brain, Ch 15
questions.explanation:
正解 **D**（不正確）。**NMO 常有腦白質病灶（亞洲 60–80%、歐洲 25–40%）**，鏡像 aquaporin-4 分布。MS 多 supratentorial(A)、活性斑環狀強化(B)、NMO 偏好視神經/脊髓(C)皆正確。

→ [[neuromyelitis-optica]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements is NOT a characteristic of parasitic leiomyoma?

options.text: Pedunculated soft tissue mass arising from the uterus.
Arterial supply is best seen on MRA.
Usually has large draining veins.
Image characters on both CT and MRI are similar to that of uterine leiomyoma.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Diagnostic Imaging: Gynecology, p.2-80~81
questions.explanation:
正解 **A**（非特徵）。Parasitic leiomyoma **與子宮分離**、自腹膜血管獲血供，非「由子宮長出的有蒂腫塊」。大引流靜脈(C)、影像似子宮肌瘤(D)、動脈血供 MRA 可見(B)皆正確。

→ [[parasitic-leiomyoma]]

questions.questionText: Pelvic congestion syndrome (PCS) is a cause of chronic pelvic pain; its typical imaging findings include all of the following EXCEPT:

options.text: Dilated, tortuous, enhancing tubular structures near the uterus and ovary.
On T1-weighted images, varices may appear as flow voids.
Ultrasound shows slow (<3 cm/s) venous flow in the cranial direction in the left ovarian vein.
More than 50% of women with PCS have associated cystic ovaries.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Semin Intervent Radiol 2008;25:361-368
questions.explanation:
正解 **C**（除外）。PCS 的 US 為慢血流（<3 cm/s）且**逆向 caudal/retrograde**（尤左卵巢靜脈），非 cranial 方向。擴張迂曲強化管狀結構(A)、T1WI flow void(B)、>50% 囊性卵巢(D)皆正確。

→ [[pelvic-congestion-syndrome]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following descriptions about acquired cystic kidney disease (ACKD) is WRONG?

options.text: Develops in patients with chronic renal failure treated by dialysis.
Not associated with increased risk of renal neoplasm.
Renal hemorrhage is a common associated complication.
The affected kidneys are usually small, but the cysts sometimes cause significant renal enlargement.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Renal Cystic Disease (Hartman), 1989, p.38-43
questions.explanation:
正解 **B**（錯誤）。**ACKD 增加腎細胞癌風險**（增生性囊腫為 dialysis-associated RCC 的可能來源）。發生於透析病人(A)、腎出血常見(C)、患腎多小但可腫大(D)皆正確。

→ [[acquired-cystic-kidney-disease]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following descriptions about urogenital tuberculosis is WRONG?

options.text: Fewer than 5% of patients with urogenital TB have concomitant active pulmonary TB.
Only 30-50% have evidence of pulmonary abnormality on chest radiograph.
Urine culture is the most definite method, and the false negative rate is less than 3%.
Imaging is essential to assess extent/severity, monitor treatment, and discover complications.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Clinical Urography (Pollack/McClennan), Vol 1, p.1193-1194
questions.explanation:
正解 **C**（錯誤）。尿培養**敏感度約 65%（偽陰性 ~35%）、特異度 100%**，偽陰性率非 <3%。<5% 同時活動性肺 TB(A)、30–50% 胸片異常(B)、影像評估必要(D)皆正確。

→ [[urogenital-tuberculosis]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following diseases is NOT associated with increased risk for renal cell carcinoma?

options.text: ADPKD.
von Hippel-Lindau disease.
Acquired cystic kidney disease associated with chronic renal failure.
All of the above.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Katabathina VS et al. RadioGraphics 2010;30:1509-1523
questions.explanation:
正解 **A**。**ADPKD 不增加 RCC 風險**（雖 60 歲約 50% 末期腎病）。von Hippel-Lindau(B)、acquired cystic kidney disease(C) 皆增加 RCC 風險。

→ [[acquired-cystic-kidney-disease]]

questions.questionText: About the TNM staging system for esophageal cancer (AJCC 7th edition), which statement is WRONG?

options.text: T4b tumors are unresectable cancers invading adjacent structures such as aorta, carotid vessels, trachea, left main bronchus, or vertebral body.
Regional lymph nodes include any paraesophageal lymph nodes from cervical to celiac nodes.
Cancer location is determined by where the tumor occupies the largest mass volume, not the position of the upper edge.
EGJ tumors are staged as esophageal cancer if the epicenter is within the proximal 5 cm of the stomach and the tumor extends into the esophagus.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；RadioGraphics 2014;34:1722-1740
questions.explanation:
正解 **C**（錯誤）。食道癌**位置由 tumor epicenter（中心）決定**，非「佔最大體積處」。regional node 範圍(B)、EGJ 近端 5 cm 規則(D)、T4 侵犯定義(A)皆正確。

→ [[esophageal-cancer-staging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following structures is the most reliable landmark for the thoracic inlet at axial CT?

options.text: First thoracic vertebra.
Thyroid gland.
Scalene muscles.
First ribs.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；RadioGraphics 2014;34:1680-1691
questions.explanation:
正解 **D**。**First ribs（第一肋骨）** 為軸狀 CT 上界定 thoracic inlet 最可靠的標誌。T1 椎體、甲狀腺、斜角肌較不可靠。

→ [[thoracic-inlet-anatomy]]

questions.questionText: Regarding stereotactic vacuum-assisted breast biopsy (VABB), which is WRONG?

options.text: Stereo pair and 0-degree scout view can calculate the 3D position of the target.
About 99% can obtain a representative sample.
Mainly for biopsy of mammographically visible lesions, especially calcifications.
A tissue marker clip is placed for future surgical localization.
If no residual calcification remains on the post-biopsy mammogram and pathology is malignant, surgical excision is not needed.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Diagnostic Imaging: Breast (Berg 2006)
questions.explanation:
正解 **E**（為非）。即使 VABB 移除全部微鈣化，惡性者手術時仍約 **80%** 有殘餘癌（Liberman et al.）→ **仍需手術切除**。stereo pair 算 3D(A)、~99% 足夠樣本(B)、針對鈣化(C)、置 marker clip(D)皆正確。

→ [[vacuum-assisted-breast-biopsy]]

questions.questionText: Regarding interpretation of breast MRI, which is WRONG?

options.text: The most fundamental required pulse sequence is dynamic contrast-enhanced MRI (DCE MRI).
Micrometastatic lymph nodes can be clearly seen on MRI.
Malignant lesions may show washout, plateau, or even persistent kinetics on DCE MRI.
DCIS may show linear or segmental clumped enhancement on MRI.
Morphology and kinetics are the two major criteria for interpreting breast MRI.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Morris/Liberman, Breast MRI 2005
questions.explanation:
正解 **B**（為非）。**MRI 無法清楚偵測淋巴結微轉移**。DCE MRI 為必備序列(A)、惡性可呈 washout/plateau/persistent(C)、DCIS 呈 linear/segmental clumped(D)、morphology＋kinetic 為兩大標準(E)皆正確。

→ [[breast-mri-kinetics]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a common ultrasound finding of testicular epidermoid cyst?

options.text: Purely cystic nodule.
Mural calcification.
Well-defined margin.
Onion-skin appearance.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；J Ultrasound Med 2010;29:831-837
questions.explanation:
正解 **A**。睪丸表皮樣囊腫為**實質、onion-skin 層狀腫塊**，非純囊性。mural calcification(~86%，B)、well-defined margin(C)、onion-skin appearance(D)皆為其表現。

→ [[testicular-epidermoid-cyst]]

questions.questionText: Which statement regarding ultrasound diagnosis of testicular torsion is WRONG?

options.text: Gray-scale ultrasound may be normal in the early phase of testicular torsion.
Preserved vascularity in the painful testis excludes the possibility of testicular torsion.
Para-testicular hyperemia is commonly seen on the affected side.
Heterogeneous echogenicity in the affected testis is a sign of testicular infarction.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；RadioGraphics 2005;25:1197-1214
questions.explanation:
正解 **B**（錯誤）。**保留血流不能排除扭轉**——不完全/部分扭轉可保留甚至增加血流；torsion-detorsion 反應性充血亦可誤判為 epididymo-orchitis。灰階早期可正常(A)、heterogeneous echogenicity 提示梗塞(D)皆正確。

→ [[testicular-torsion]]

questions.questionText: Which statement regarding ultrasound appearance of hepatic hemangioma is WRONG?

options.text: Typically hyperechoic when the tumor is smaller than 2.5 cm.
Increased echogenicity of the tumor following progression of fatty liver.
Heterogeneous internal echoes are more commonly seen in larger tumors.
May have a thin echogenic rim around the tumor.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Korean J Radiol. 2000;1(4):191-197
questions.explanation:
正解 **B**（錯誤）。脂肪肝進展使肝背景變亮，血管瘤**相對回音『降低』**（可呈 hypoechoic）。<2.5 cm 多高回音(A)、較大者異質回音(C)、薄 echogenic rim(D)皆正確。

→ [[hepatic-hemangioma]]

questions.questionText: MRI showed a "bright tongue sign"; it is a diagnostic marker for which disease?

options.text: ALS (amyotrophic lateral sclerosis).
ALD (adrenoleukodystrophy).
MLD (metachromatic leukodystrophy).
PML (progressive multifocal leukoencephalopathy).

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；Arq Neuropsiquiatr. 2014;72(7):572
questions.explanation:
正解 **A**。**Bright tongue sign（舌肌 T1 高訊號，慢性去神經/脂肪取代）為 ALS 的診斷標記**（另有 motor band sign）。ALD、MLD、PML 為其他白質病變。

→ [[als-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which artery reaches the skull base and can on occasion have intracranial anastomoses through the foramen lacerum and other routes?

options.text: Middle meningeal artery.
Accessory pharyngeal artery.
Ascending pharyngeal artery.
Persistent stapedial artery.

questions.explanation:
正解 **C**。**Ascending pharyngeal artery（升咽動脈）** 的小腦膜分支經 foramen lacerum 達顱底,可與顱內(ICA/椎基底)吻合。ICA 沿 foramen lacerum 上緣走但不穿過。

→ [[carotid-vertebrobasilar-anastomoses]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is the most common location for posttraumatic myositis ossificans?

options.text: Skull.
Trunk.
Proximal extremities.
Distal extremities.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；RadioGraphics 2016;36:1195-1214
questions.explanation:
正解 **C**。創傷後骨化性肌炎最常侵犯**四肢近端（前側肌群，股四頭肌與肱肌最常受累）**。

→ [[myositis-ossificans]]

questions.questionText: For arrhythmogenic right ventricular dysplasia (ARVD), the typical criteria that can be demonstrated with MRI are:

options.text: Fatty infiltration of the RV myocardium.
Aneurysms of the RV and RVOT.
Dilatation of the RV and RVOT.
All of the above.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；心臟 MR ARVD criteria
questions.explanation:
正解 **D**（以上皆是）。ARVD 的 MRI 典型表現含 RV 心肌脂肪浸潤(A)、RV/RVOT 動脈瘤(B)、RV/RVOT 擴張(C)。

→ [[arrhythmogenic-rv-dysplasia]]

questions.questionText: Where is the most common location of myocardial bridging?

options.text: Middle segment of LAD.
Distal segment of RCA.
PDA.
Proximal segment of LAD.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；冠狀動脈 CTA 解剖
questions.explanation:
正解 **A**。**Myocardial bridging 最常見於 LAD 中段（middle segment）**。

→ [[coronary-artery-variants]]

questions.questionText: The course of the short LAD is along the proximal AIVS; the long LAD has an epicardial course on the LV side of the proximal AIVS, reentering the distal AIVS. Which type of dual LAD is this?

options.text: Type I.
Type II.
Type III.
Type IV.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；dual LAD 分型
questions.explanation:
正解 **A（Type I）**。short LAD 走近端 AIVS、long LAD epicardial 於 LV 側再入遠端 AIVS,分支 septal＋diagonal ＝ Type I。

→ [[coronary-artery-variants]]

questions.questionText: Causes of vascular rings and slings commonly include all of the following, EXCEPT:

options.text: Double aortic arch.
Right aortic arch.
Aortic coarctation.
Pulmonary sling.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；血管環影像
questions.explanation:
正解 **C**。**Aortic coarctation（主動脈窄縮）非血管環/吊帶成因**。double aortic arch(A)、right aortic arch(B)、pulmonary sling(D)皆為常見成因。

→ [[vascular-rings-slings]]

questions.questionText: About the coronary circulation, which pair of vessels has a compensatory relationship?

options.text: LAD & LCX.
RCA & PDA.
LAD & PDA.
LAD & RCA.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；冠狀動脈解剖
questions.explanation:
正解 **C**。**LAD 與 PDA 互為代償**——LAD 繞心尖供應下壁心尖,一者長則另一者短。

→ [[coronary-artery-variants]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT in the differential diagnosis of spiculated masses?

options.text: Postbiopsy scar.
Tubular cancer.
Radial scar.
Mucinous (colloid) carcinoma.

questions.reference: 官方 2017 詳解；The Requisites: Breast Imaging 3rd ed., p.142
questions.explanation:
正解 **D**。**Mucinous (colloid) carcinoma 呈圓形/邊界清楚腫塊**，非毛刺狀。postbiopsy scar(A)、tubular cancer(B)、radial scar(C)皆為 spiculated mass DDx。

→ [[breast-spiculated-mass]]
